name: china-phone
description: China phone number prefix lookup — carrier, province, city, and line type from official MIIT data. Does NOT access carrier networks or verify subscriber activity.

tools.name: lookup_china_phone
tools.title: Lookup China Phone
tools.description: Look up a Chinese mobile phone number's prefix attribution. Returns carrier name, province, city, area code, postal code, region code, and number type (mobile/landline) based on official MIIT allocation tables. Prefix-level lookup only — does NOT verify subscriber activity or access carrier networks.

tools.name: get_china_phone_info
tools.title: Get China Phone Info
tools.description: Get detailed carrier and geographic attribution for a Chinese phone number. Returns carrier, province, city, area code, postal code, region code, number type, and prefix validity from MIIT official allocation data.
